title: Bert's July Dividend Income Summary | Dividend Investing 2022
text: Our total dividend income decreased from $771.96 received in July 2021. Canadian Imperial takes the crown for the largest dividend payment of the month.

title: Illinois Tool Works: Solid Growth Potential
text: Approximately 85% of the Illinois Tool Works' business portfolio is witnessing strong demand. The company should benefit from the pricing actions, stabilization in supply chain constraints and moderation in input costs.

title: 2 Safe Dividend Stocks That Wall Street Is Sleeping On
text: This pair of income-generating sleepers ought to wake up your portfolio in the years to come.

title: Why Illinois Tool Works Stands For Quality Dividends
text: Illinois Tool Works offers outperforming total returns despite very slow sales growth as it has perfected the art of raising profitability. Dividend investors benefit from strong free cash flow generation, a 2.4% yield, and consistent dividend growth.

title: Illinois Tool Works: Wait For A Better Buying Opportunity
text: Illinois Tool Works is one of the best dividend growth stocks to add to a portfolio in a bear market to generate significant long-term returns. A mid-single-digit organic growth rate for the full year and strong results for the second quarter support the dividend growth prospects of the company.

title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates
text: Illinois Tool Works' (ITW) Q2 earnings reflect gains from solid results in most of its segments. High tax rate and cost woes restrict margin growth.

title: ITW Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: GLENVIEW, Ill., Aug. 02, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Illinois Tool Works Inc. (NYSE: ITW) today reported its second quarter 2022 results.

title: Verizon, Intuit Among 15 Companies To Announce Annual Dividend Increases In August
text: A whole host of companies rewarded investors with nice dividend increases in July. Among the biggest boosts were Cintas and Hershey, which announced 21% and 15% increases, respectively.
